purpose: Как обновлять состояние текущей сцены после ответа ChatGPT.
allowed_scene_state_updates: time advancement if scene explicitly passed time
npc_presence update if a session NPC appeared or left

add_only_if: character is contacted by phone/radio/message and becomes active
scene contract included delayed/conditional arrival and condition is met
do_not_add_if: character is important in canon but absent
assistant wants dramatic entrance without setup
they are in relationship_pairs but not in scene
remove_if: POV leaves the place and no contact remains

time_rules.medium_step: tens of minutes, if travel/training/meal is summarized
time_rules.large_step: hours/days only if player requested skip or scene contract permits
time_rules.forbidden: do not skip important NPC answer/question without offering choice

location_rules.privacy_change: changing location changes NPC presence rules and character loading for next turn
